businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker transitioning into a 'Physical AI Platform' spanning robotaxis, humanoid robots, and energy storage
businessSummary.description: Tesla is rapidly transforming from an EV manufacturer into an integrated AI, robotics, and energy platform company. FY2025 revenue was $94.8B (-2.9% YoY), with net income plunging 46.5%. Friday close $396.73 (-2.17%). Today (3/9) is the NHTSA FSD safety review final deadline — 2.88M vehicles under investigation, 58 incidents linked. Tokyo FSD Supervised demos continued over the weekend, Austin robotaxi fare hike ($1→$3.25) showing sustained demand. Market cap $1.49T, P/E 392.38x, Forward P/E 191.85x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Vehicle sales: ~73% of revenue ($69.5B). Model 3/Y core, Model S/X discontinuing Q2 2026
Energy business: ~14% of revenue ($12.8B, +27% YoY). Megapack utility-scale storage
Services/Other: ~13% of revenue ($12.5B). Supercharger network, insurance, maintenance
FSD subscription: $99/month autonomous driving software (subscription-only since Feb 2026)
keyProducts: Cybertruck (base AWD trim with massive demand, deliveries pushed to 2027)
Optimus (humanoid robot, Fremont factory conversion underway)
Megapack (utility-scale energy storage, Megapack 3 and Mega Block launching 2026)

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme valuation. AI/robotics premium vs actual earnings

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 EPS $2.08 estimate. Still very elevated

keyMetrics.name: PEG Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Significantly overvalued relative to growth rate

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: First-ever FY decline. Global EV competition intensifying

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Near historic lows. Significant decline from FY2022

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Down from FY2024. Profitability recovery needed

growthDrivers.title: NHTSA FSD Safety Review — Today (3/9) Final Deadline
growthDrivers.description: 2.88M vehicles under investigation with 58 linked incidents. Final deadline after two extensions. Approval accelerates nationwide autonomous rollout; failure risks 30% downside and potential recall.

growthDrivers.title: Austin Robotaxi Fare Hike — Monetization Signal
growthDrivers.description: Base fare raised $1→$3.25, yet wait times remain 10-15 minutes showing strong demand. Revenue per 5-mile ride jumped from $6 to $8.25. Pricing power confirmed.

growthDrivers.title: Tokyo FSD Supervised Demos Continue — Japan Entry
growthDrivers.description: Public FSD demonstrations continued throughout the weekend in Tokyo. In dialogue with Japanese regulators, establishing beachhead for international FSD expansion.

growthDrivers.title: European Recovery Signal — France & Norway Share Rebound
growthDrivers.description: Per Reuters, Tesla market share rebounded in France and Norway in February. Stabilization signal after two consecutive years of European sales decline.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 50%+ US EV market share leader, though overtaken globally by BYD. Vertical integration across software, manufacturing, energy, and 8.2B FSD miles is the core moat.

moats.description: 8.2 billion FSD miles. Overwhelming training data advantage over competitors.
In-house battery (4680), custom chips (HW4), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS is North America's EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian all depend on Tesla Superchargers.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: 2025 global EV sales leader. Rapid European expansion, US limited by tariffs

competitors.name: Rivian (RIVN)
competitors.detail: R2 SUV ($45,000) launching 2026, directly competing with Model Y

competitors.name: Xiaomi
competitors.detail: YU7 SUV outselling Model Y 2:1 in China

recentNews.headline: NHTSA FSD safety review final deadline — 2.88M vehicles under investigation
recentNews.significance: Final data submission deadline after two extensions. D-day for stock direction

recentNews.headline: Austin robotaxi base fare raised from $1 to $3.25
recentNews.significance: Excess demand driving price increase. Entering monetization trajectory

recentNews.headline: Tokyo FSD Supervised public demonstrations continue
recentNews.significance: Japan market entry and international FSD expansion first step

recentNews.headline: Jobs shock + oil past $90 triggers broad tech selloff
recentNews.significance: Nasdaq worst week since October. TSLA -2.17%

recentNews.headline: German gigafactory union election — IG Metall breakthrough attempt
recentNews.significance: Berlin plant labor tensions. Cost increase risk

analystOpinions.notableComment: Dan Ives (Wedbush) maintains $600, Gordon Johnson (GLJ) maintains $25. Extreme polarization. Morgan Stanley cut $425→$415.

risks.title: NHTSA FSD Review Uncertainty
risks.description: Today (3/9) final deadline. 58 incidents, 14 Austin crashes. Recall or FSD restrictions could trigger 30% downside.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation
risks.description: P/E 392x, Forward P/E 192x. Hard to justify premium amid revenue contraction.

risks.title: Intensifying Global EV Competition
risks.description: BYD global #1, Xiaomi YU7 2:1 vs Model Y in China, Rivian R2 launching. Market share defense burden.

risks.title: Macro Headwinds
risks.description: Iran war prolonging, oil $90+, jobs shock. Consumer sentiment deterioration risk.

risks.title: European Sales Weakness
risks.description: UK sales -37%, German labor disputes. European recovery delay risk.

buyReasons.title: Undisputed Autonomous Driving Leader
buyReasons.rationale: 8.2B FSD miles, Austin robotaxi commercialized, Tokyo international expansion. 2-3 years ahead of competitors.

buyReasons.title: High-Growth Energy Business
buyReasons.rationale: Megapack +27% YoY growth. Utility storage market expanding as a new growth engine.

buyReasons.title: FCF Rebound + Healthy Balance Sheet
buyReasons.rationale: FCF $6.22B (+73.7%), net cash $29.3B. Ample investment capacity.

buyReasons.title: Optimus & Cybercab Optionality
buyReasons.rationale: Humanoid robot and robotaxi not yet priced into current valuation as potential upside.

overallOpinion: With the NHTSA FSD safety review reaching its final deadline today (3/9), short-term volatility is at maximum. Approval would accelerate nationwide robotaxi expansion to Phoenix, Miami, and Vegas, enabling a $450+ re-rating. Failure could trigger recalls and FSD restrictions, opening downside to $320-350. The Austin fare hike proves demand monetization, and Tokyo demos confirm international ambitions. However, P/E 392x assumes flawless execution, while revenue contraction, European weakness, and macro headwinds weigh on sentiment. Waiting for the NHTSA outcome before entering is the prudent strategy.

2.88M vehicles, 58 incidents linked.

Would you buy before the NHTSA verdict?

telegram.hook: 🚨 Tesla NHTSA D-Day — The Future of Autonomy Decided Today

NHTSA FSD safety review final deadline — 2.88M vehicles, 58 incident data submission due.
Last chance after two extensions.

📊 Current status:

• P/E 392x — perfection-priced valuation

Wait for the verdict before entering.
